## Pull Request — Release Readiness Check

### Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? -->

### Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Hotfix (requires CAB approval)
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] Dependency update

### Release checklist
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 80% maintained
- [ ] No critical lint errors
- [ ] Staging tested (for release/* merges)
- [ ] Rollback impact assessed
- [ ] Release notes updated

### Change Risk
- [ ] Low — no schema/config changes
- [ ] Medium — config changes, new endpoints
- [ ] High — schema migration, breaking changes

**Change ticket (if required):** CHG___________
